measurement.definition: native B coherence after the fixed six-slot response protocol minus matched native B coherence before that protocol
measurement.value_semantics: 0 or one fixed registered response-packet amount; this measures native response scheduling-and-arrival occurrence rather than graded magnitude

window_protocol.operational_exception_policy: null response and operationally invalid; never scientific zero

purity_preconditions: packet and boundary-birth queues empty before the window
B distinct from B_ref and every response front-mask carrier
B baseline and response configuration exactly paired
B has no causal flux route, balancing operation, background update, or topology integration
neutral contact and M_H materialization complete before B_before
purity_postconditions: packet and boundary-birth queues empty after the window
scheduled response has exactly one linked A-to-B departure and B arrival
unscheduled/native-block response has no response packet and no B change
no other event targets or changes B
measurement.purity_failure: registration blocked; changing to packet-attributable or background-subtracted response reopens I04/I05

leave_one_branches.matched_source_activity: q2 source debit/activity preserved through matched inert-sink diversion
q1 source debit/activity preserved through matched inert-sink diversion

primary_pairing.derived_comparator: maximum oriented response of both leave-one branches within mode, seed, and physical order
primary_pairing.reason: fixed strongest-marginal comparison resolves source asymmetry, preserves both source activities, changes the mode-relevant carrier, and is not selected from observed effect size
matching_duties: q1 and q2 physical amount, type, event-relative timing, cost, and source debit
route class, latency, capacity, support, neutral contact, opportunity, response policy, and B baseline
only common-carrier admission versus matched inert-sink diversion differs
primary_pairing.raw_retention: candidate, both leave-one responses, selected maximum, and margin retained per mode/seed/order

preserve: q1 and q2 amount, type, target-carrier operation, and physical order
total source-side cost/depletion, support, timing, opportunity, policy, and B baseline
complete mode-relevant carrier when source-role physics permits
quantity_matched_scope_diagnostic.source_symmetry_registration: each source must independently emit both q operations with matched route class, cost, reserve, capacity, support, and eligibility
quantity_matched_scope_diagnostic.equivalence_relation: allowed and expected when the complete causal carrier is identical
quantity_matched_scope_diagnostic.divergence_relation: retained as a source-role/contribution-structure scope qualification and checked against carrier equality
quantity_matched_scope_diagnostic.R03_effect: numerical equivalence alone has none; full single-source explanation requires evidence that the actual candidate lacked two-source constitution or bypassed the common carrier

aggregation_and_missingness.scientific_no_response_policy: only a complete fixed window with zero response packet and zero B change may record 0
aggregation_and_missingness.operational_missingness_policy: raw/oriented response null; affected mode/seed/order primary tuple not evaluable; no imputation or denominator removal
aggregation_and_missingness.raw_retention: every branch, source role, physical order, seed, response, event link, and diagnostic remains visible

paired_margin.pairing: same mode, seed, physical order, B baseline, fixed-window protocol, and frozen configuration
paired_margin.runtime_tolerance_source: none; all runtime and continuation tolerances are separate I06 registrations

I06_numeric_admissibility.packet_amount_rule: r >= 1024*raw_floor and r >= 1024*max(ulp(B_before), ulp(B_before+r)) for every branch
I06_numeric_admissibility.roundtrip_rule: B_before, r, and B_before+r finite and canonical-JSON round-trippable; recomputed gain positive
I06_numeric_admissibility.runtime_tolerance_rule: every separately registered runtime/restoration/continuation tolerance is less than r/1024 and is never inferred from analysis_arithmetic_delta
I06_numeric_admissibility.failure_effect: configuration cannot register; analysis-floor or response changes reopen I04/I05

relation_classifier.per_order_seed_panel: three margins within one mode and physical order
relation_classifier.per_mode_panel: six margins retained as two separate per-order panels
relation_classifier.narrow_aligned: at least one margin exceeds delta, none is below negative delta, and not all exceed delta
relation_classifier.resolution_limited: every absolute margin is at most delta
relation_classifier.mixed_direction: at least one margin exceeds delta and at least one is below negative delta
relation_classifier.narrow_counter: at least one margin is below negative delta, none exceeds delta, and not all are below negative delta
relation_classifier.robust_counter: every margin is below negative delta
relation_classifier.resolution_unknown: delta unavailable or a required response operationally not evaluable
relation_classifier.not_applicable: only by separately reviewed control rationale
relation_classifier.order_conditioned_or_mixed: at least one order has a resolved non-resolution relation and OP-08 passes while the other differs, is resolution-limited, or is counter-directional
relation_classifier.causal_failure_separation: not_top_aligned never by itself means mode_hypothesis_failed; carrier-chain and mandatory-control evidence decide causal failure

machine_rule_vocabulary.invariant: all absolute normalized differences at most delta
machine_rule_vocabulary.different_unsigned: all absolute normalized differences exceed delta
machine_rule_vocabulary.aligned_all: all oriented normalized differences exceed delta
machine_rule_vocabulary.raw_visibility: all required raw records present without unauthorized reduction
machine_rule_vocabulary.primary_relation: derive and retain the corrected candidate-minus-strongest-symmetric-leave-one margin and per-order relation; metric nonalignment alone never assigns causal failure
machine_rule_vocabulary.scope_diagnostic: equivalent and divergent outcomes both retained; matching and carrier-equality status determine scope reading, never automatic R03 failure
machine_rule_vocabulary.causal_chain_derived: candidate and substitute status derived from linked masks, arrivals, calls, packet events, configurations, and receipts
machine_rule_vocabulary.access_relation_retained: at least two of three alternate-responder margins aligned per order with no counter-direction

candidate_requirements: two distinct source-role arrivals target the registered common carrier
response front mask equals the registered mode-specific common carrier mask and excludes source roles/private cross-reads
native feedback producer record links to one A-to-B packet departure and arrival
RCAE/adapter response-phase calls contain no forbidden direct response or contributor-addressed read
causal_chain_evidence.private_exclusion: each legitimate response mask is contained in exactly one registered private partition; no mask spans partitions or common aggregate
causal_chain_evidence.controller_exclusion: recorded response-phase calls or inputs expose direct scheduling, contributor-slot reads, authored success, or controller aggregation

independent_per_mode: six primary margins and raw branches

common_control_rules.held_fixed: opportunity, support, fixed response window, response policy, and the retained source's registered contribution operation
common_control_rules.effect: both marginal responses remain visible; neither may be silently promoted to the combined response

common_control_rules.held_fixed: all contribution physics, causal carrier state/history, physical order, routes, support, opportunity, and response configuration
common_control_rules.effect: failure blocks attribution-only invariance and R04

common_control_rules.held_fixed: explicitly not a pure-label intervention; changed amount, location, timing, type, or route is retained
common_control_rules.effect: divergence is diagnostic and cannot be called label-control failure

common_control_rules.held_fixed: both source activities/debits, q1/q2 physics and physical order, route class, support, opportunity, response policy, and B baseline; one q is diverted to a matched inert sink in each symmetric arm
common_control_rules.effect: owns the corrected primary margin; a non-top metric relation is retained separately from carrier-chain or mode-hypothesis failure

common_control_rules.held_fixed: source activity/debit, lineage, support, opportunity, and response configuration while common-carrier admission is prevented
common_control_rules.effect: failure to remove or change the candidate carrier relation blocks the affected R03/R04 causal claim

common_control_rules.held_fixed: marginal writes, route class, timing, support, and access opportunity; each legitimate private response mask remains within one partition
common_control_rules.effect: a mask spanning private partitions or reading a common aggregate blocks R04

common_control_rules.held_fixed: nearest output opportunity and complete raw response retention
common_control_rules.effect: forbidden scheduling, contributor-addressed read, or authored-success provenance excludes the branch even if outputs match or differ

common_control_rules.held_fixed: q1/q2 physics and physical order, full carrier when source-role physics permits, total source cost/depletion, support, opportunity, response policy, and B baseline; repeated-S1 and repeated-S2 both retained
common_control_rules.effect: carrier-matched equivalence is valid and cannot alone fail R03; divergence qualifies source-role/contribution scope

common_control_rules.held_fixed: common carrier, contributions, support, policy class, fixed response window, and non-private mask; responder role and registered reserve/route are the contrast
common_control_rules.effect: pass permits bounded R05 access retention only

state_carried.relation: responses are invariant when complete native P state is equal
response tracks the intervened native P state
audit order and lineage cannot enter V

history_carried.relation: equal marginal quantities with different ordered H_P produce different later responses
P is excluded from the history-carried V path
response tracks active H_P through native M_H

hybrid.relation: retain raw responses for candidate_P/candidate_H, reference_P/candidate_H, candidate_P/reference_H, and reference_P/reference_H with exact held-fixed component identities
full candidate differs from reference_P/candidate_H while H_P/M_H remains fixed
full candidate differs from candidate_P/reference_H while P remains fixed
equal P with different active H_P/M_H changes the same native joint response
retain any interaction diagnostic but impose no nonlinearity, synergy, irreducibility, or superadditivity requirement
